name: AI-RAG-Assistant-Chatbot
description: 👨🏻‍💻 Meet Lumina – my personal AI assistant powered by hybrid RAG with Pinecone vector search and Neo4j graph traversal, Google AI, LangChain, and an MCP server with 30+ tools. Features real-time streaming, conversation branching, and a multi-agent agentic AI pipeline for intelligent, grounded responses with inline citations.
